title: Tag
description: A community-maintained taxonomy tag for categorizing Lobsters stories

description.description: Short human-readable description of what the tag covers

privileged.description: Whether this tag can only be applied by moderators

is_media.description: Whether this tag denotes media content (video, audio, etc.)

active.description: Whether the tag is currently available for use

hotness_mod.description: Hotness score modifier applied to stories with this tag

permit_by_new_user.description: Whether new users are permitted to apply this tag

category.description: Name of the parent category this tag belongs to
